He has been proud to serve the constituency of Milton Keynes North since his election in July 2024. ​ Chris is a vocal advocate for our growing city and its needs - from housing, to education, to the NHS and social care. He holds weekly surgeries and is regularly out knocking on doors to hear from residents in our city, villages and towns about what matters to them. READ MORE HOW CAN WE HELP? news_items.title: Chris Curtis for Milton Keynes North

pages.title: About Chris | Chris Curtis MP
pages.meta_description: Chris Curtis is the first MP for Milton Keynes to be born and brought up here. He has been proud to serve the constituency of Milton Keynes North since his election in July 2024.
headings: h2: NEED HELP WITH A LOCAL ISSUE?
pages.text_excerpt: --> About Chris | Chris Curtis MP top of page Home Latest News About Chris Raise a local issue Campaigns Your Management Company Experiences Time to Deliver Petition More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Have your say ABOUT CHRIS Chris Curtis is the first MP for Milton Keynes to be born and brought up here. He has been proud to serve the constituency of Milton Keynes North since his election in July 2024. ​ Chris is a vocal advocate for our growing city and its needs - from housing, to education, to the NHS and social care. He holds weekly surgeries and is regularly out knocking on doors to hear from residents in our city, villages and towns about what matters to them. Before entering Parliament, Chris had a successful career as a market researcher. Within this role, he supported a variety of causes including working with Shelter on their campaign for social housing. He comes from a family dedicated to public service - his mum a teacher, his brother a brave local firefighter, and Chris is grateful to have the opportunity to serve the people of Milton Keynes North as a hardworking local MP. NEED HELP WITH A LOCAL ISSUE? My team and I are here to help in any way we can. Click the button below to raise an issue with us. GET IN TOUCH Home Latest News About Chris Raise a local issue Campaigns Your Management Company Experiences Time to Deliver Petition More Use tab to navigate through the menu items.
